title: ExploratoryConceptCatalog
description: The canonical 3C metadata-only exploratory concept catalog collection. Contains exactly three entries at initial 3C release. No runtime authority. Governed by Extension 3C blueprint v0.1.0 and engineering spec v0.1.0.

schema_version.description: Schema version literal. Must equal 3c-catalog-1. Spec §5.1.

extension_id.description: Extension identifier literal. Must equal 3c. Spec §5.1.

entries.description: Exactly 3 entries at initial 3C release. One for each of EXT-DISC-007, EXT-DISC-018, EXT-DISC-019. No duplicates. Spec §5.2, §6.
